text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF Cost and Use Segment Codebook │ March 2026 │ V 1.3 11 

ASC_BENE_PMT 

LABEL: Ambulatory Surgery Center Beneficiary Payments 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the sum of coinsurance and deductible payments in the Part B ambulatory surgery center 
(ASC) setting for a given year. The total beneficiary payment is calculated as the sum of the 
LINE_COINSRNC_AMT + LINE_BENE_PTB_DDCTBL_AMT for all relevant lines. 

ASC claim lines are a
